message.content:
@startuml
class Key {
    +public
    ◇protected
    □private
    +public method()
    ◇protected method()
    □private method()
}

class Creator {
    SceneManager makeScene(QJsonObject spec)
    Table makeTable(QJsonObject spec)
    Ball makeBall(QJsonObject spec)
}

class SceneBuilder {
    void setTable(Table)
    void addBall(Ball)
    void resetBalls()
    SceneManager build()
}

class SimpleCreator {
    Table makeTable(QJsonObject spec)
    Ball makeBall(QJsonObject spec)
}

class SimpleTable {
    □ QColor color
    ● void draw(QPainter painter)
}

class SimpleBall {
    □ QColor color
    ● void draw(QPainter painter)
}

class Table {
    ○ QSize dimension
    ○ float surface_friction
}

class Ball {
    ○ float mass
    ○ QVector2D position
    ○ QVector2D velocity
    ○ float radius
}

class MainWindow {
    ↑ Qtimer updater
    ↑ Qtimer ticker
    ↑ QElapsedTimer timer
    ● SceneManager scene
    ● void paintEvent(QPaintEvent event)
    ● void tick()
    ● void nextFrame()
}

class SceneManager {
    □ Table table
    □ vector<Ball> balls
    □ QPoint offset
    QSize viewport()
    void tick(float dttime)
    void draw(QPainter painter)
}

class Graphic {
    ● void draw(QPainter painter)
}

class Creator --> SceneBuilder : "1" * "1"
class SceneBuilder --> SceneManager : "1" * "1"
class SceneManager --> Table : "1" * "1"
class SceneManager --> Ball : "1" * "1"
class SceneManager --> Graphic : "1" * "1"
class SceneManager --> MainWindow : "1" * "1"
class MainWindow --> SceneManager : "1" * "1"
class MainWindow --> Graphic : "1" * "1"
class MainWindow --> Key : "1" * "1"
class SimpleCreator --> Table : "1" * "1"
class SimpleCreator --> Ball : "1" * "1"
class SimpleTable --> Table : "1" * "1"
class SimpleTable --> Key : "1" * "1"
class SimpleBall --> Table : "1" * "1"
class SimpleBall --> Key : "1" * "1"
class Table --> Key : "1" * "1"
class Ball --> Key : "1" * "1"
class Creator --> Table : "1" * "1"
class Creator --> Ball : "1" * "1"
class Creator --> SceneManager : "1" * "1"
class SceneBuilder --> Table : "1" * "1"
class SceneBuilder --> Ball : "1" * "1"
class SceneBuilder --> SceneManager : "1" * "1"
class SimpleTable --> Key : "1" * "1"
class SimpleBall --> Key : "1" * "1"
class Table --> Key : "1" * "1"
class Ball --> Key : "1" * "1"
@enduml
